video_summary: A casual block puzzle game with a heart-themed aesthetic. Players drag various block shapes (pinks and creams) onto an 8x8 grid to complete lines, triggering 'Combo' and 'United' score multipliers with polished visual effects like glowing bars and floating particles.
gameplay_loop: The player selects block shapes from a tray at the bottom and places them on an 8x8 grid. Completing a full horizontal or vertical line clears the blocks, awards points, and triggers combo multipliers. The goal is to keep the board from filling up while maximizing the score.
camera_and_canvas: Static vertical portrait orientation (9:16 aspect ratio). The camera is fixed on the game board and UI elements.

art_style.summary: Casual 2D vector-style puzzle game with a 'sweet' candy-like aesthetic, featuring soft beveled blocks and a warm chocolate-toned background.
art_style.rendering: 2D vector-cartoon with clean gradients and soft inner glows.
art_style.line_work: Thin, subtle dark-brown outlines on blocks to provide depth; UI text uses thick brown drop shadows.
art_style.palette: Warm and saturated, dominated by dusty pink, cream, chocolate brown, and golden yellow.
art_style.shading: Soft cel-shading with subtle top-down gradients on blocks to create a tactile, 3D-beveled appearance.
art_style.scale_feel: Toy-like and tactile; blocks feel like physical plastic or candy tiles.

assets.name: Main Background Plate
assets.visual_description: A solid warm chocolate-brown background with a subtle leather or paper-like texture.
assets.gameplay_role: Static background for the entire game screen.
assets.animation_notes: Static background.
assets.background_plate_notes: The texture is very subtle; ensure the brown remains warm and not too dark.

assets.name: Puzzle Grid
assets.visual_description: An 8x8 grid of dark brown squares with thin, slightly lighter brown dividing lines.
assets.gameplay_role: The play area where blocks are placed.
assets.animation_notes: Static, but cells may highlight when a block is hovered over them.
assets.background_plate_notes: The grid is slightly darker than the main background.

assets.name: Pink Heart Tile
assets.visual_description: A square pink tile with a soft beveled edge and a darker pink heart icon embossed in the center.
assets.gameplay_role: Basic building block for puzzle shapes.
assets.animation_notes: Pulses slightly when part of a cleared line.

assets.name: Cream Heart Tile
assets.visual_description: A square cream-colored tile with a soft beveled edge and a light brown heart icon embossed in the center.
assets.gameplay_role: Basic building block for puzzle shapes.
assets.animation_notes: Pulses slightly when part of a cleared line.

assets.name: Main Score Display
assets.visual_description: Large, bold white sans-serif numbers with a soft drop shadow.
assets.gameplay_role: Displays the player's current session score.
assets.animation_notes: Numbers count up rapidly when points are earned.
assets.background_plate_notes: The font is clean and modern.

assets.name: Combo Text Asset
assets.visual_description: Bubbly, rounded 'Combo' text in cream color with a thick brown outline and golden glow.
assets.gameplay_role: Feedback text appearing during line clears.
assets.animation_notes: Pops in with a scale-up bounce effect.

assets.name: United Text Asset
assets.visual_description: Italicized, bubbly 'United' text in white with a thick pink outline.
assets.gameplay_role: Feedback text for high-tier line clears.
assets.animation_notes: Slides in or pulses when active.
assets.background_plate_notes: Layered behind or below the Combo text.

assets.name: Horizontal Clear Glow
assets.visual_description: A horizontal golden-yellow glowing bar with light particles and sparkles.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual effect for clearing a horizontal line.
scenario_pipeline: VFX prompt for 'golden energy beam with sparkles'
assets.animation_notes: Expands from the center and fades out quickly.

assets.name: Vertical Clear Glow
assets.visual_description: A vertical golden-yellow glowing bar with light particles.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual effect for clearing a vertical line.
scenario_pipeline: VFX prompt for 'vertical golden energy beam'
assets.animation_notes: Expands and fades out.

assets.name: Combo Heart Pulse
assets.visual_description: A large, glowing pink heart that appears at the top center of the screen.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual indicator of an active combo streak.
assets.animation_notes: Pulses in size rhythmically.
assets.background_plate_notes: Positioned behind the score or at the very top edge.

assets.name: Thumbs Up Feedback
assets.visual_description: A small green circular icon with a white thumbs-up symbol inside.
assets.gameplay_role: Appears over cleared tiles to indicate a good move.
assets.animation_notes: Floats upward and fades out.

assets.name: Tray Block 3x3 Pink
assets.visual_description: A 3x3 square arrangement of pink heart tiles, shown at a smaller scale in the selection tray.
assets.gameplay_role: Selectable block shape.
assets.animation_notes: Glows slightly when available; shrinks when dragged.
assets.background_plate_notes: The tray blocks are smaller than the grid blocks until picked up.

assets.name: Settings Icon
assets.visual_description: A simple cream-colored gear icon.
assets.gameplay_role: Button to open settings menu.
assets.animation_notes: Static.

assets.name: Crown High Score Icon
assets.visual_description: A small, golden crown icon with three points and a rounded base.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual indicator for the high score section.
assets.animation_notes: Static icon.

assets.name: High Score Text
assets.visual_description: Yellow-gold numeric text displaying the player's all-time high score.
assets.gameplay_role: Displays the persistent high score.
assets.animation_notes: Static text.

assets.name: 2x2 Cream Block Piece
assets.visual_description: A square piece composed of four cream-colored heart tiles in a 2x2 arrangement.
assets.gameplay_role: A playable piece in the tray to be dragged onto the grid.
scenario_pipeline: Assemble from single cream tile assets
assets.animation_notes: Shrinks slightly when appearing in the tray; expands to full size when dragged.

assets.name: L-Shape Pink Piece (3 Tiles)
assets.visual_description: A small L-shaped piece made of three pink heart tiles.
assets.gameplay_role: A playable piece in the tray.
scenario_pipeline: Assemble from single pink tile assets
assets.animation_notes: Glows slightly when it first appears in the tray.

assets.name: Block Debris Particles
assets.visual_description: Small, square-shaped particles in pink and cream that burst outward when a line is cleared.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual feedback for clearing blocks.
scenario_pipeline: Match color and physics of the video
assets.animation_notes: Fast outward burst with gravity-based fall-off.

assets.name: Good! Feedback Text
assets.visual_description: Stylized green text saying 'Good!' with a thick white border and soft shadow.
assets.gameplay_role: Positive reinforcement for clearing lines.
scenario_pipeline: Recreate text with green gradient and white stroke
assets.animation_notes: Pops in with a scale-up bounce and floats upward slightly before fading.

assets.name: Great! Feedback Text
assets.visual_description: Stylized gold/yellow text saying 'Great!' with a thick white border.
assets.gameplay_role: Positive reinforcement for high-scoring moves.
scenario_pipeline: Recreate text with gold gradient and white stroke
assets.animation_notes: Pops in with a scale-up bounce and floats upward.

assets.name: Floating Score Popup
assets.visual_description: Floating pink numeric text with a '+' sign (e.g., +211, +158).
assets.gameplay_role: Shows immediate points earned from a move.
scenario_pipeline: Recreate numeric font with pink color
assets.animation_notes: Floats upward and fades out quickly.

assets.name: Combo Digit 2
assets.visual_description: A large, stylized orange-pink digit '2' with a white outline.
assets.gameplay_role: Indicates the current combo multiplier.
assets.animation_notes: Bounces and scales up when appearing.

assets.name: Combo Digit 3
assets.visual_description: A large, stylized orange-pink digit '3' with a white outline.
assets.gameplay_role: Indicates the current combo multiplier.
assets.animation_notes: Bounces and scales up when appearing.

assets.name: Twinkling Star Sparkles
assets.visual_description: Small, four-pointed yellow stars that appear around feedback text.
assets.gameplay_role: Decorative visual polish for rewards.
assets.animation_notes: Stars rotate and scale down quickly after appearing.
